RimWorldCultivation.CultivationLayerDef.label: Dragon Alignment
RimWorldCultivation.CultivationLayerDef.description: Sovereign Breath: unleashing devastating elemental force. Strong area damage and crowd breaking.

RimWorldCultivation.CultivationLayerDef.label: Fenghuang Alignment
RimWorldCultivation.CultivationLayerDef.description: Ashen Covenant: self-resurrection through rebirth or sacrificial party-wide restoration.

RimWorldCultivation.CultivationLayerDef.label: Kitsune Alignment
RimWorldCultivation.CultivationLayerDef.description: Nine-Tail Mirage: blink displacement leaving a decoy illusion that breaks aggro.

RimWorldCultivation.CultivationLayerDef.label: Komainu Alignment
RimWorldCultivation.CultivationLayerDef.description: Guardian Gate: project a physical and projectile-blocking threshold barrier.

RimWorldCultivation.CultivationLayerDef.label: Basilisk Alignment
RimWorldCultivation.CultivationLayerDef.description: Stone-Gaze Mandate: mass stun or temporary petrification in a line of sight.

RimWorldCultivation.CultivationLayerDef.label: White Hart Alignment
RimWorldCultivation.CultivationLayerDef.description: Sanctuary Path: create a path that stabilizes, speeds up, and guards allies in distress.

AbilityDef.label: Sovereign Breath
AbilityDef.description: Unleash a supernatural cone of destructive force.

AbilityDef.label: Sovereign Immolation
AbilityDef.description: Sacrifice the physical body to heal and stabilize all nearby allies.

AbilityDef.label: Nine-Tail Mirage
AbilityDef.description: Blink to a nearby position, leaving an illusion that attracts aggro.

AbilityDef.label: Guardian Gate
AbilityDef.description: Create a temporary force barrier protecting a chokepoint.

AbilityDef.label: Stone-Gaze Mandate
AbilityDef.description: Petrify and stun targets in a direct line of sight.

AbilityDef.label: Sanctuary Path
AbilityDef.description: Create a path of protection that guides and stabilizes retreating allies.
